headline: S&P 500 Eases On Iran Ceasefire Jitters, Crude Soars To $90: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks gave up early gains Tuesday as oil jumped nearly 3%. UnitedHealth surged 8% on strong earnings.

headline: Precious metal companies are trading lower as a stronger dollar and rising yields weigh on gold and silver prices. Fed Chair Nominee Warsh's comments and tentative talks between the U.S. and Iran have weakened the commodity.
